message:
fix(node): harden eviction saga crash recovery for Compensating phase

Add transition-history introspection to crash recovery for sagas in the
Compensating phase, determining the original compensation action from
recorded transitions instead of using a generic fallback. Add orphan
detector that catches sagas stuck in Compensating state beyond their
timeout. Include detailed documentation comments explaining the recovery
semantics and new tests validating the crash recovery paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
